channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Motörhead's Longtime Guitarist Phil Campbell Passes Away at 64 Following Major Surgery
item.description: Phil Campbell, the Welsh guitarist renowned for his 31-year tenure with the heavy metal band Motörhead, has died at the age of 64. His family, through the band Phil Campbell and The Bastard Sons—which...

item.title: Authorities identify Michigan synagogue attacker whose relatives died in Israeli airstrike on Lebanon
item.description: Authorities in Michigan have identified the suspect responsible for the attack on the Temple Israel Synagogue in West Bloomfield as Ayman Mohamad Ghazali, a 41-year-old Lebanese-born American citizen....

item.title: PDEa intercepts P95.2 million worth of shabu hidden in pick-up truck tire at Surigao port, suspect arrested
item.description: The Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) successfully intercepted a significant shipment of suspected shabu, or crystal methamphetamine, during an anti-narcotics operation in Surigao del Norte. T...

item.title: Police Promise Full Security for Soludo’s Second Term Inauguration in Anambra
item.description: Police for Anambra State don promise say dem go dey on top security matter well well ahead of Governor Chukwuma Soludo second term inauguration wey go happen on March 17, 2026. Spokesperson, Tochukwu ...

item.title: Sukhbir Badal Comments on BJP Contesting 2027 Punjab Elections Independently
item.description: Shiromani Akali Dal (SAD) president Sukhbir Singh Badal stated on Saturday in Ludhiana that every political party has the authority to decide its alliances. This comes after the Bharatiya Janata Party...

item.title: Canada Wins Fourth Paralympic Wheelchair Curling Title with Undefeated Run
item.description: Canada’s wheelchair curling team achieved an extraordinary milestone at the Milano-Cortina Paralympic Games, securing their fourth Paralympic gold medal and first since 2014. The Canadian rink, featur...

item.title: U.S. KC-135 Refueling Plane Crashes in Western Iraq, Killing Six Crew Members
item.description: Six U.S. service members have been confirmed dead after a KC-135 military refueling aircraft crashed in western Iraq on March 12, 2026. The U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) reported that the crash occur...

item.title: Thermal Convection Reveals Swirling Structures Deep Within Greenland’s Ice Sheet
item.description: Researchers from the University of Bergen, in collaboration with NASA Goddard, the University of Oxford, and ETH Zurich, have discovered massive plume-like structures deep inside the Greenland ice she...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Disrupts Kenya's Agricultural Exports, Costing Sh300 Million Weekly in Meat and Other Products
item.description: Agriculture Cabinet Secretary Mutahi Kagwe has raised alarm over the serious impact of the escalating conflict in the Middle East, which now involves Iran, the United States, and Israel, on Kenya's ke...

item.title: Why More Young Filipinos Are Exploring Analog Hobbies
item.description: In the Philippines and worldwide, young people are increasingly turning to analog hobbies as a way to unplug from digital life. From film photography and vinyl records to journaling and board games, t...

item.title: Brumbies aim to quickly recover after first-ever loss to Fijian Drua in Ba
item.description: The ACT Brumbies suffered a significant 42-27 defeat to the Fijian Drua in Ba on Saturday, marking the Drua's maiden victory over the Brumbies in seven encounters and their first win on home soil in t...

item.title: Trump says multiple countries may assist US in keeping Strait of Hormuz navigable
item.description: US President Donald Trump has claimed that several countries will send their naval forces alongside the United States to ensure the Strait of Hormuz remains open and safe for international shipping. H...

item.title: U.S. Military Destroys Iranian Mine-Laying Vessels and Facilities Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. military announced it had successfully destroyed multiple Iranian naval assets, including 16 mine-laying vessels and associated storage facilities near the Strait of Hormuz, as part of ongoin...

item.title: President Samia expresses condolences on the passing of former BoT Governor Dr Idriss Rashid
item.description: ZANZIBAR: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has publicly expressed her condolences following the passing of Dr Idriss Rashid, the former Governor of the Bank of Tanzania (BoT). Dr Rashid served as BoT Gov...

item.title: Geological survey begins for relocating families affected by Uttarkashi floods
item.description: Authorities in Uttarakhand have expedited the relocation of 115 families from Dharali following the devastating flash floods in August last year, which buried parts of the area under 15 to 20 metres o...

item.title: Eleventh Suspect Faces Court in R10 Million Alleged Insurance Fraud and Murder Case
item.description: An 11th individual, Robert Shokane, has appeared briefly in the Polokwane magistrate’s court in connection with a long-running alleged insurance-related murder and fraud scheme in South Africa. Shokan...

item.title: Tesla to Start Production at New AI Chip Factory in One Week
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk announced that the company’s Terafab project, which is aimed at producing advanced artificial intelligence (AI) chips, will officially launch in seven days. This ambitious project ...

item.title: DCI arrests two suspects and seizes 180kg of narcotics in Machakos
item.description: Early on 12th March 2026, the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) carried out a successful operation in Joska, Machakos County, leading to the arrest of two men and the seizure of around 180 ...

item.title: South African Reality TV Couple Faces Shoplifting Charges in the U.S.
item.description: Melany and Peet Viljoen, a South African couple known for their appearances on a local reality TV show, have recently run into legal trouble in the United States. The couple, who previously promoted d...

item.title: Ensuring Accessible Justice for Women and Girls is Essential for Equality
item.description: At the 70th session of the Commission on the Status of Women (CSW70), South Africa emphasised that access to justice is fundamental for achieving gender equality. Across the globe, women face structur...
